description: A plain, undesigned candid operational photograph from the same ICE Los Angeles SBA COVID-fraud operation. In a backyard with green hedges and artificial turf, a bald, muscular detained man in a white tank top and dark sweatpants stands handcuffed behind his back, flanked by federal agents. The agent on the left wears a black vest marked with a large 'E' (HSI/ERO style) and a gaiter face covering; the agent on the right (back to camera) wears a white t-shirt and a black plate carrier reading 'POLICE / HOMELAND SECURITY INVESTIGATIONS' with the HSI badge logo, jeans, and a holstered pistol, and appears to be holding a camera. Another partially visible person stands at right. The scene is a documentary news-style arrest photo with no on-image text overlay, graphic design, slogan, or composed layout. Not a meme/designed graphic.
notable_text: On-image text only as printed on gear: 'POLICE HOMELAND SECURITY INVESTIGATIONS'.
